Subject: King Charles III has cancer, Buckingham Palace announces

Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<td id="Card9501274" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href9501274" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACH5C2M3GHV7DNSROJFMNQ3ZZOZGGFQSR27RXOMAWKMSGX3FWZR5GFI3C2DP4FRP2N4HZSQ6NCMFU2BW7ZLTATCXQ55NEWHNGEJZDXBUPRY4UWQCMJIBVDKNU44RNNBXG6OWJLW5PFISIYVJJKHCUMWGKL34BJOCFK5LRVMERWV2MUNOGC4WH&" target="_blank">

                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title9501274" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href9501274" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAD3P3FR3XXQTQEBET6PAU7NTNLIPLGLORZNF2FYX2CJ5B2XWC3MJJVRGEK3JZI5STAT2NB2LX66NWWISKYKF7XSW2X3TCCIF2IWFMJZKXESTSMWVKDH5NCPUNHHU2XTG6Y75XOXC6E3XTZTEZSAIAW2XZOUJW6B6DK2F6JRNTXHE7QYK6CT6I&" target="_blank">
                        Miley Cyrus Channels Tina Turner and Calls Out Crowd During 'Flowers'…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td id="ProviderName9501274" height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">
                                    <a id="Href9501274" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADCJIVAYBAHUWB7L6LLBZMAV2LIPRCU4AW2PAU7JDRCI34GL4DUTMXO2F2S5YH7JOTCLM34KPUVTMUGM5ZFLTFMNL6N5XUCCPWWHBSIQQUW226TG5KNZLNRT2POY4IAEELPSWYBF34456GNVU22VIHFBZJAB7BECUHTJRJFWNVOC22IMKVMOH&" target="_blank">
                                        People
                                    </a>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </td>
            </tr>
        </tbody>
    </table>

</td>

                                </tr>
                            </table>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
<tr>
    <td height="12"></td>
</tr>

                <!-- End of NL Body -->
                <!-- Footer -->
                
    <tr>

<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">

</tr>
